seoTitle: Cairns North vs Calamvale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cairns North and Calamvale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cairns North vs Calamvale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cairns North and Calamvale.
heading: Cairns North vs Calamvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cairns North, Queensland and Calamvale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cairns North has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Calamvale (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cairns North or Calamvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cairns North has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Calamvale scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cairns North scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Calamvale scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cairns North or Calamvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cairns North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
